name: SparkPost
description: SparkPost is an email delivery service that provides high-volume sending, real-time analytics, and deliverability optimization. It offers APIs for transmissions, template management, message event tracking, sending domain configuration, and detailed deliverability metrics.

auth.note: Pass the API key directly in the Authorization header without any prefix.

capabilities.name: transmissions_create
capabilities.description: Send an email to one or more recipients using inline content or a stored template.

capabilities.name: transmissions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a scheduled or recently sent transmission.

capabilities.name: transmissions_list
capabilities.description: List recent transmissions with optional campaign_id filter.

capabilities.name: transmissions_delete
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled transmission by ID.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email template as a draft with HTML/text content and substitution variables.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific template by ID. Optionally get the draft version.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing template. Use update_published=true to push changes to live version.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete both draft and published versions of a template.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List all templates in the account. Returns up to 50,000 templates.

capabilities.name: templates_preview
capabilities.description: Preview a template with substitution data to see the rendered output.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: Search message events (deliveries, bounces, opens, clicks, spam complaints). Data retained for 10 days.

capabilities.name: events_documentation
capabilities.description: Get descriptions of all available event fields across event types.

capabilities.name: events_samples
capabilities.description: Get sample event payloads for specified event types.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_create
capabilities.description: Register a new sending domain for email delivery. Requires DNS verification.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific sending domain including verification status.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_list
capabilities.description: List all sending domains with optional filtering by verification status.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_update
capabilities.description: Update a sending domain configuration including tracking domain and DKIM settings.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a sending domain from the account.

capabilities.name: sending_domains_verify
capabilities.description: Initiate or complete verification of a sending domain via DKIM or CNAME.

capabilities.name: recipient_lists_create
capabilities.description: Create a stored recipient list for reuse across transmissions.

capabilities.name: recipient_lists_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific recipient list by ID.

capabilities.name: recipient_lists_list
capabilities.description: List all recipient lists in the account.

capabilities.name: recipient_lists_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing recipient list by replacing its recipients.

capabilities.name: recipient_lists_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a recipient list by ID.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_search
capabilities.description: Search the suppression list with filtering by type, source, and date range.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_get
capabilities.description: Get all suppression entries for a specific recipient.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_create_or_update
capabilities.description: Add or update a single suppression entry for a recipient.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_bulk_upsert
capabilities.description: Bulk create or update up to 10,000 suppression entries at once.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a suppression entry for a specific recipient.

capabilities.name: suppression_list_summary
capabilities.description: Get a summary of suppression counts grouped by source.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook to receive real-time event notifications at a target URL.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook configuration.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks configured in the account.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook configuration including target URL and event types.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_validate
capabilities.description: Send a test event to a webhook target URL to verify connectivity.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_create
capabilities.description: Create a custom tracking domain for open/click tracking.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific tracking domain.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_list
capabilities.description: List all tracking domains.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_update
capabilities.description: Update a tracking domain configuration.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tracking domain.

capabilities.name: tracking_domains_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a tracking domain CNAME configuration.

capabilities.name: metrics_deliverability
capabilities.description: Get aggregate deliverability metrics (deliveries, bounces, opens, clicks).

capabilities.name: metrics_by_domain
capabilities.description: Get deliverability metrics grouped by recipient domain.

capabilities.name: metrics_by_campaign
capabilities.description: Get deliverability metrics grouped by campaign.

capabilities.name: metrics_by_template
capabilities.description: Get deliverability metrics grouped by template.

capabilities.name: metrics_bounce_reasons
capabilities.description: Get bounce reason analysis with classification details.

capabilities.name: metrics_timeseries
capabilities.description: Get time-series deliverability metrics over a date range.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subaccount with its own API key for tenant isolation.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific subaccount.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_list
capabilities.description: List all subaccounts in the account.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_update
capabilities.description: Update a subaccount name, status, or IP pool assignment.
